mapper.select: SELECT email_log_id, client_id, po_id, email_title, email_recipient_name, email_recipient_email, email_sender_id, email_status, email_sent_at, created_at FROM email_logs WHERE email_log_id = #{emailLogId}
SELECT email_log_id, client_id, po_id, email_title, email_recipient_name, email_recipient_email, email_sender_id, email_status, email_sent_at, created_at FROM email_logs ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT email_log_id, client_id, po_id, email_title, email_recipient_name, email_recipient_email, email_sender_id, email_status, email_sent_at, created_at FROM email_logs WHERE client_id = #{clientId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT email_log_id, client_id, po_id, email_title, email_recipient_name, email_recipient_email, email_sender_id, email_status, email_sent_at, created_at FROM email_logs WHERE email_status = #{emailStatus} ORDER BY created_at DESC
